task_completion.description: Open the specification document located on the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or document viewer is open displaying the sensor housing specifications, including dimensions for the body and boss.
The SolveSpace application window is visible on the screen with a blank canvas or active sketch.

task_completion.description: Draw the basic geometry of the sensor housing cross-section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace canvas shows a 2D sketch of a rectangular housing with a raised rectangular section (boss), resembling a stepped rectangle or an inverted T-shape.

task_completion.description: Apply the five dimensional constraints to the sketch.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The sketch in SolveSpace displays numerical dimensional constraints matching the specification: 96.0 (body width), 48.0 (body height and boss width), 32.0 (boss height), and 24.0 (left boss offset).

task_completion.description: Save the sketch as a .slvs file in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace window title bar displays 'sensor_housing.slvs', or a save dialog is visible saving the file to '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/'.

task_completion.description: Export the sketch as a DXF file to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog in SolveSpace is visible saving 'sensor_housing.dxf', or a file manager window shows 'sensor_housing.dxf' present in the '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the SolveSpace GUI to create the sketch.
integrity.visual_evidence: SolveSpace GUI is actively used to draw and constrain the sketch. Look for visible toolbars, property panels, and active canvas interaction rather than just a final loaded file.

integrity.description: The agent used SolveSpace's built-in export functionality for the DXF.
integrity.visual_evidence: The DXF file is exported via SolveSpace's menu (e.g., File -> Export 2d View) or export dialogs, rather than being created via terminal commands like 'touch'.

integrity.description: The agent did not use scripts to bypass manual CAD work.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are visible running Python or bash scripts that directly generate the .slvs or .dxf files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The sensor housing sketch must have the following exact dimensions applied as constraints: body width = 96.0 mm, body height = 48.0 mm, boss width = 48.0 mm, boss height = 32.0 mm, and left boss offset = 24.0 mm. The files must be saved as '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/sensor_housing.slvs' and exported as '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/sensor_housing.dxf'.
